summary: Implemented the Foreman dashboard reader, TUI navigation stack, live polling, Alt+T shortcut, and reader tests. Verified with the new reader test plus existing gate-flow acceptance test.
raw:
## Completed
Implemented Phase B Foreman Dashboard: pure ledger reader, navigable TUI, live polling, Alt+T shortcut, and reader tests.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/dashboard/reader.ts` - pure defensive ledger readers/view-model builders.
- `extensions/foreman/dashboard/view.ts` - picker/root/agent TUI dashboard with polling and navigation.
- `extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh` - headless reader acceptance test.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - registered `alt+t` dashboard shortcut.

## How To Verify
`bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gate_flow_test.sh`

## Notes
Verification command passed. Existing unrelated Phase A working-tree changes/ledgers were left untouched.
